rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HORACE ALANSON WELLER III
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: grant without hearing. order revised as the court will not approve actions taken by the petitioner in her role as trustee (13100 declarations), will not approve transfer of assets from the estate to the trust without prior court approval and will not find that there never were probate assets. order will close the estate and order subsequently found assets be transferred to the Trustee.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARIA OLIVIA LOPEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to may 18, 2016. the sole remaining issue is verification of the funds on deposit with Bridgehampton National Bank. a bank letter was filed, but the letter did not confirm the assets on hand in the account and a deposit receipt is not sufficient to show the funds remain in the account. no later than friday, may 13, 2016, either a new bank letter showing the balance or the account statement must be filed.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE OF THE GAETKE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Show Cause Re Contempt To Compel Compliance With The Courts Orders Of April 24 2015 And August 19 2015 And For Payment Of Costs And Attorney Fees Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Supporting Declaration Of Jeffrey S Frasier With Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: The motion for an order to show cause re contempt is granted. Respondent and her counsel have not fully complied with this Court's order from April 24, 2015 or August 19, 2015. Respondent Debra Tyler is ordered to produce the required information no later than ten days from the date of the order or show cause why she should not be held in contempt. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order specifying what information remains outstanding. After the Court signs the order, the prevailing party must personally serve the order on Ms. Tyler. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify counsel and court no later than 5/3/2016, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EMILA DI FRANCO GLESSI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Louis Muschi's Motion for Protective Order is granted. Petitioners may not conduct an oral deposition of Mr. Muschi (telephonic or otherwise). The parties must meet and confer regarding the previously propounded written interrogatories. After the meet and confer conference, petitioners may if they choose, propound one final set of written interrogatories by May 11, 2016. Mr. Muschi will have until May 20, 2016 to provide verified responses. (C.C.P. Section 2025.420(b)(5)-(7). Mr. Muschi's counsel must prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must contact the Court and opposing counsel no later than 5/3/2016, at 4:00 p.m.
